# [Clang] Assertion failure in `clang::Type::isConstantSizeType` when instantiating template with reference to local static variable

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/174953

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 16.0.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/3zsjbMjGf

## Program
```cpp
#include <iostream>
template<int& T>
void FuncTemplate() {
    std::cout << "Template instantiated with reference to int: " << T << std::endl;
}

template<int i> class A {};
template<int i> void g(A<i> &) {
    static int InternalVar = 43;
    FuncTemplate<InternalVar>();
} 

int main()
{
  A<1> a;
  g(a);
}

```

PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.

## Program
```cpp
#include &lt;iostream&gt;
template&lt;int&amp; T&gt;
void FuncTemplate() {
    std::cout &lt;&lt; "Template instantiated with reference to int: " &lt;&lt; T &lt;&lt; std::endl;
}

template&lt;int i&gt; class A {};
template&lt;int i&gt; void g(A&lt;i&gt; &amp;) {
    static int InternalVar = 43;
    FuncTemplate&lt;InternalVar&gt;();
} 

int main()
{
  A&lt;1&gt; a;
  g(a);
}

```
